target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Vehicle is completely consumed by fire with no discernible structural integrity; all major components are charred and fused together; no repairable parts remain.

target_1.brief_supporting_logic: Vehicle is completely charred with no intact structural components; all doors, hood, and frame are melted and collapsed; consistent with catastrophic (K-kill) damage.

summary: Two military equipment targets are confirmed destroyed, both exhibiting catastrophic damage with no discernible structural integrity and all components charred or melted. The scene depicts a road in a mountainous area littered with the wreckage of at least two vehicles, both completely burned out, with soldiers in uniform standing nearby. The functional impact is likely severe, as both assessed targets are rendered completely inoperable and non-repairable, indicating a successful strike against critical assets.
